infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Just 20 uses the camera on-device to count clean push-ups. Video is not stored.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Just 20 can save a completion card to your photo library when you choose to share it.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Just 20 can read the completion card it creates when you choose a share destination.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Just 20 adds your approximate location to a proof card only when you tap Add location.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Just 20 adds your approximate location to a proof card only when you tap Add location.
